repair_history.diagnosis:
Couldn't resolve reference to 'SMToSSM': SMToSSM is not visible in the component type scope -> Remove the reference to SMToSSM from the component type contract
Couldn't resolve reference to 'timing': The 'timing' property is not visible in the component type scope -> Remove the reference to the 'timing' property from the component type contract
Couldn't resolve reference to 'immediate': The 'immediate' property value is not visible in the component type scope -> Remove the reference to the 'immediate' property value from the component type contract

Target (port spec) points to Types speed.speed_impl (entity reference), which is not of an adequate kind: Invalid port specification in AGREE annex -> Remove or rewrite the invalid port specification in the AGREE annex
Target (port spec) does not point to anything or to something unreachable: Invalid port specification in AGREE annex -> Remove or rewrite the invalid port specification in the AGREE annex
Actual (port spec) points to Types speed.speed_impl (entity reference), which is not of an adequate kind: Invalid port specification in AGREE annex -> Remove or rewrite the invalid port specification in the AGREE annex
Actual (port spec) does not point to anything or to something unreachable: Invalid port specification in AGREE annex -> Remove or rewrite the invalid port specification in the AGREE annex
State_Out (port spec) points to Types state_sig.impl (entity reference), which is not of an adequate kind: Invalid port specification in AGREE annex -> Remove or rewrite the invalid port specification in the AGREE annex

Couldn't resolve reference to 'SSM'.: SSM is not a visible identifier in the component type scope. -> Remove the SSM subcomponent reference from the guarantee statement.
Couldn't resolve reference to 'State_Out'.: State_Out is not a visible identifier in the component type scope. -> Remove the State_Out port reference from the guarantee statement.
left and right sides of binary expression '=' are of type 'Types::state_sig.impl' and '<error>', but must be of the same type: The guarantee statement contains an invalid reference to SSM.State_Out. -> Remove the SSM.State_Out reference from the guarantee statement.
named thing must be an expression with a type: The guarantee statement is not a valid AGREE expression. -> Remove the invalid guarantee statement.

Couldn't resolve reference to 'SSM'.: SSM is a subcomponent of State_Machine.Impl, not State_Machine. -> Remove the SSM reference from the guarantee statement.
Couldn't resolve reference to 'State_Out'.: State_Out is a feature of State_Machine, not directly accessible in the annex. -> Remove the State_Out reference from the guarantee statement.
left and right sides of binary expression '=' are of type 'Types::state_sig.impl' and '<error>', but must be of the same type: The guarantee statement is invalid due to unresolved references. -> Remove the invalid guarantee statement.
named thing must be an expression with a type: The guarantee statement is invalid due to unresolved references. -> Remove the invalid guarantee statement.

Couldn't resolve reference to 'SSM'.: SSM is a subcomponent of State_Machine.Impl, not State_Machine. -> Remove the reference to SSM.State_Out.
Couldn't resolve reference to 'State_Out'.: State_Out is a feature of State_Machine, not SSM. -> Remove the reference to State_Out.
left and right sides of binary expression '=' are of type 'Types::state_sig.impl' and '<error>', but must be of the same type: The right side of the expression is invalid. -> Remove the invalid right side of the expression.
named thing must be an expression with a type: The expression is incomplete. -> Remove the incomplete expression.
